title: Clock Overlay
description: Use clocks to show the time in-game!
body:
This mod adds an overlay that displays the current in-game time.
It has two modes: - Held in Hand: displays the time when the player is holding a clock. - In Player Inventory: displays the time when the player has a clock in their inventory. The clock color has three modes: - White - Rainbow - Time-dependent The clock is also displayed in item frames if they contain a clock item.
Since version 1.4.0:
The overlay can also display the current in-game day (also work in item frame).
Added an options to adjust the overlay opacity.
Planned features:
-Specify a custom color via config. ![image](https://i.imgur.com/ImgDsCc.png)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/7HjhTHN.png)
